content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-feedback loop can be reframed as a single-perspective base case for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine becomes a distinct inconsistent perspective that can be aggregated to boost reflection quality. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data while leveraging the strength of multi-perspective reflection to resolve blind spots that single-iteration self-feedback cannot catch.
